title: Scratch Everywhere! Custom Extension Metadata
description: Schema for the meta.json file of a Scratch Everywhere! custom extension.

core.description: Indicates if the extension shoule be considered a core extension.

id.description: The ID of the custom extension, should match the one in TurboWarp.

name.description: The human-readable name of the custom extension.

description.description: A brief summary of what the custom extension does.

permissions.description: A list of permissions the custom extension requires to function.

platforms.description: A list of platforms this custom extension is compatible with.

minAPI.description: The minimum required API version in 'major.minor' format.

settings.description: An array of user-configurable settings for the custom extension.

name.description: The display name for the setting.

type.description: The type of UI control for this setting.

default.description: The default value for the setting.

min.description: The minimum value for the slider.

max.description: The maximum value for the slider.

snap.description: The increment value for the slider.

prompt.description: The prompt text for the setting.
